Video.title: Awesome Academy | Move Your Body!

Video.summary: Wheels, boards, and parachutes are these athletes vehicles of choice in the season finale of Awesome Elements!
Video.title: Awesome Elements | The Heart of the Matter

Image.alt: Awesome Elements | The Heart of the Matter
Awesome Elements | The Heart of the Matter
Awesome Elements | The Heart of the Matter

Video.summary: From surfing to skydiving, from basketball to mountain biking, these athletes can do it all.
Video.title: Awesome Elements | Mind Over Matter

Video.summary: From sky-high feats to deep-sea dives, awesome people around the world conquer everything in between.
Video.title: Awesome Elements | What's the Matter?

Video.summary: Watch these incredible athletes perform impressive feat on land and by sea!
Video.title: Awesome Elements | No Matter What

Video.summary: A microscopic guitar, an insane maze, sushi with personality, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.1

Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.2

Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.1

Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.4

Video.summary: Every backdrop offers a new stage for performances worthy of a standing ovation.
Video.title: Showcase | Opening Night

Video.summary: The summer sun is blistering, but these beach bums bring the real heat.
Video.title: Showcase | Dog Days

Video.summary: The summer sun is blistering, but these beach bums bring the real heat.
Video.title: Showcase | Dog Days

Video.summary: Small-town suburbia to downtown metropolis - anywhere can be home to the extraordinary.
Video.title: Showcase | Hometown Heroes

Video.summary: The views may be stunning, but these athletes aren’t stopping to smell the roses.
Video.title: Showcase | The Scenic Route

Video.summary: They tried this at home...and succeeded!
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Suburbia, Vol. 2

Video.summary: They tried this at home...and succeeded!
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Suburbia, Vol. 2

Video.summary: Paved streets and cityscapes make for great adventures.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Concrete Jungle

Video.summary: Anyone can be an athlete, all it takes is time.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Everyday Amazing

Video.summary: Extraordinary feats are no problem for these talented athletes.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Stunt Spectacular

Video.summary: Flexibility and focus is all they need to succeed.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Circus Arts, Vol. 2

Video.summary: Whatever the weather, these athletes shine.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Winter World

Video.summary: From the tallest towers to the deepest oceans, adventure is everywhere.

Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Extreme Skill

Video.summary: Maintain your balance with unwavering focus and determination.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Sense and Stability
